chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.name: Helix guardrail drift
chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.description: Flag any instruction or prompt that contradicts Helix safety guardrails: production deploy confirmation, no secret handling in chat, no raw client PII in chat, submodules read-only, product guardrails, changelog logging, and the user-tier taxonomy. Report only concrete contradictions or missing risky-action checks.

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.name: Agent output skew
chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.description: Flag wording that biases the agent toward a predetermined conclusion, excessive positivity, unnecessary implementation, or a preferred style when the user is asking for analysis. Do not flag firm tone or concise British English unless it conflicts with accuracy or user intent.

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.name: Context weight
chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.description: Flag broad, duplicated, or always-on instructions that add cognitive load without changing behaviour. Prefer narrower applyTo patterns, references to existing source-of-truth docs, or deletion of stale guidance.

chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.name: Risky action approval
chatCustomizationsEvaluations.customDiag.description: Flag prompts that ask the agent to mutate production, deploy, run database writes, alter secrets, or change submodules without an explicit confirmation path, dry-run option, rollback note, or local-only boundary.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Prioritize correctness, security, and TypeScript types. Flag unsafe SQL, secret leakage, and missing error handling. Skip minor style nits unless risky.

github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Use Conventional Commits. Format: <type>(<scope>): <subject>. Types: feat, fix, refactor, docs, test, build, chore. Subject in imperative mood.
Wrap body at ~72 chars; include WHY and notable trade-offs. Reference issues with #<id> when applicable.

github.copilot.chat.pullRequestDescripti.text: Include summary, key changes, risk/impact, testing steps, and rollback plan. Use bullet lists. Link related issues.
